mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_template_action WHERE template_day_id = #{templateDayId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_template_action (template_day_id, action_id, action_name, min_sets, max_sets, rest_minutes, sort_order) VALUES (#{templateDayId}, #{actionId}, #{actionName}, #{minSets}, #{maxSets}, #{restMinutes}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO plan_template_action (template_day_id, action_id, action_name, min_sets, max_sets, rest_minutes, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.templateDayId}, #{item.actionId}, #{item.actionName}, #{item.minSets}, #{item.maxSets}, #{item.restMinutes}, #{item.sortOrder})
